category_sources: Official GitHub README describes PathPicker as a command-line tool for selecting files out of bash output.
source_facts.description says it accepts piped input and presents files for selection.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is PathPicker.
source_facts.homepage uses the PathPicker project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents examples, installation, advanced functionality, and configuration notes.
source_facts.homepage is the official project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/facebook/PathPicker; per instruction, not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes parsing command output, presenting a selector UI, and opening or executing commands on selected files.
